Only confirmed hard number: Colombian tile manufacturer — +7% average ticket size
Measured over April–September 2023 (6 months) across RPP dealers. Multi-surface visualisation showed wall and floor tile combinations, prompting customers to extend scope — adding wall tiles, countertops, and accessories. This is the only quantified AOV figure across all 27 case studies.

Qualitative AOV signals — directional but no % confirmed

SegmentSignalMechanism
Luxury rug brandLarger rugs purchasedShoppers visualise rugs under furniture → choose bigger, higher-value option
Colombian tile manufacturerWall + floor combosVisualising floors prompts adding wall tiles — confirmed multi-surface upsell
Large NA tile & flooring manufacturerCross-sell doublingMulti-surface viz doubled product views, driving more category exploration
Home remodeling showroom (Texas)Larger project scopesPRO follow-up links kept customers engaged → fewer project drop-offs
Egyptian rug manufacturerHigher-income customersVisualisation attracted a higher-spending segment per app registration data

Returns — complete dataset findings

Only confirmed mention: home décor e-commerce — returns reduced in wallpaper & fabric
No percentage given. Mechanism: over 90% of shoppers upload their own room photo before purchasing → higher confidence → fewer regret-based returns. No other case study across all 24 explicitly names returns reduction as a confirmed outcome.

How this calculator works: Enter your business metrics on the left. The right column adjusts Roomvo's expected performance impact. The pricing section auto-calculates your setup fee (per SKU, by product type) and monthly service fee (by traffic tier) — both feed into the ROI model. Every field is live: change any input and all outputs recalculate instantly.

Roomvo Virtual Samples
Rotate, zoom and view products under different lighting conditions in full 3D — no physical sample required. Included in all plans.
ROOMVO ADS Real estate platform integration — capture high-intent traffic
How it works: Your Visualizer is integrated into real estate platforms. Homebuyers click "Restyle" on property listings to visualize your products in homes they're considering. Interested buyers click "Shop this product" and are redirected to your website. You pay per view generated ($0.08/view flat rate). This drives incremental high-intent traffic to your site.
Platform selection
Traffic data: SimilarWeb Analytics (February 2026)

25% adoption rate from Realestate.com.au case study: 1 in 4 users virtually renovate. Max capacity = Platform visitors × 25%.
$
Flexible prepaid at $0.08/view. Can be topped up anytime.
%
Beaulieu achieved: 1.46% · Conservative: 1.0%
Include in Year 1 ROI calculation
How traffic converts: Ads drive traffic to your website. That traffic converts at your website's baseline conversion rate (currently 2.5% from main calculator). Simple, transparent, realistic — no dubious compounding.

Roomvo Ads pricing tiers (at 1.46% CTR)
Plan Views Budget Traffic Redirects
Starter 100,000 $8,000 1,460
Standard 200,000 $16,000 2,920
Enterprise 1 300,000 $24,000 4,380
Enterprise 2 400,000 $32,000 5,840
Enterprise 3 500,000 $40,000 7,300
Enterprise 4 600,000 $48,000 8,760
Enterprise 5+ Negotiated Negotiated To be advised
All plans: $0.08 per view flat rate · 50% Roomvo match on first campaign · Credits can be topped up anytime
Pricing model: $0.08 per view (flat rate). Roomvo Ads is a flexible prepaid media credit — purchase any amount, use as views are generated, and top up anytime. 50% Roomvo match applies to first campaign only (or per campaign at Roomvo's discretion). Credits never expire.

Investment & return schedule — detail for CFO / buying committee
ItemList priceDiscountNet payableNotes

Setup fee is charged once at contract signature. Annual subscription is due at the start of each contract year. Additional 10% discount available for multi-year upfront payment. All figures in USD unless otherwise stated. Projections are illustrative estimates based on published case study data — actual results vary by market, catalog depth, and integration quality.

Your revenue projection vs published case study benchmarks

Benchmarks reflect the floor, moderate, and ceiling outcomes across 27 published case studies. Conservative scenario: 2.1× conversion multiplier + 7% AOV lift (lowest confirmed figures). Sources: Roomvo-published case studies 2018–2026.
